Imports

hyperscan/bindings

Types

Database = ref DatabaseObj
ExpressionInfo = object
  minWidth*, maxWidth*: cuint
  unorderedMatches*: bool
  matchesAtEod*: bool
  matchesOnlyAtEod*: bool
HsException = object of CatchableError
  code*: HsError
MatchCallback = proc (id: cuint; fromOffset, toOffset: culonglong): bool
Return false to terminate scanning early 
Pattern = object
  expr*: string
  flags*: cuint
  id*: cuint
Scratch = ref ScratchObj
Stream = ref StreamObj

Procs

proc clone(s: Scratch): Scratch {....raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Clones a scratch space. 
proc close(stream: Stream; cb: MatchCallback = nil) {....raises: [HsException],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Closes the stream and flushes any pending matches. 
proc compile(pattern: string; flags: cuint = 0; mode: cuint = HS_MODE_BLOCK): Database {.
    ...raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compile a single regex pattern into a Database. 
proc compile(patterns: openArray[Pattern]; mode: cuint = HS_MODE_BLOCK): Database {.
    ...raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compile multiple patterns into a single Database. 
proc compileLit(pattern: string; flags: cuint = 0; mode: cuint = HS_MODE_BLOCK): Database {.
    ...raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compile a literal (non-regex) pattern into a Database. 
proc deserialize(data: openArray[byte]): Database {....raises: [HsException],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Deserializes a database from a byte sequence. 
proc expressionInfo(pattern: string; flags: cuint = 0): ExpressionInfo {.
    ...raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns width and match property info for a pattern without compiling. 
proc info(db: Database): string {....raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns a human-readable info string for the database. 
proc newScratch(db: Database): Scratch {....raises: [HsException], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Allocates a scratch space for the given database. 
proc openStream(db: Database; scratch: Scratch): Stream {....raises: [HsException],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Opens a streaming scan session. 
proc reset(stream: Stream; cb: MatchCallback = nil) {....raises: [HsException],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Resets a stream without closing it. 
proc scan(db: Database; data: string; cb: MatchCallback): bool {.
    ...raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Convenience overload — allocates a temporary scratch space. 
proc scan(db: Database; data: string; scratch: Scratch; cb: MatchCallback): bool {.
    ...raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Scans data in block mode. Returns true if scanning completed, false if the callback requested early termination. 
proc scan(stream: Stream; data: string; cb: MatchCallback): bool {.
    ...raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Pushes data into the stream. Returns false on early termination. 
proc serialize(db: Database): seq[byte] {....raises: [HsException], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Serializes the database to a byte sequence. 
proc size(db: Database): csize_t {....raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the size in bytes of the compiled database. 
proc size(s: Scratch): csize_t {....raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the size in bytes of the scratch space. 
proc validPlatform() {....raises: [HsException], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Raises HsException if the current CPU is unsupported. 
proc version(): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the Hyperscan library version string.
